name: Lolly's Swiss Steak
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Round Steak - all fat, trimmed off
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small microwave-safe dish, place the seasoned steak.
2. Sprinkle salt to taste on the steak.
3. Arrange the onion, green pepper, garlic, and mushrooms on top of the steak.
4. Pour 14-16 oz of stewed tomatoes over the vegetables.
5. Cover the dish and microwave for 14 minutes on high.
6. At the halfway point (7 minutes), turn the dish to ensure even cooking.
7. Variations:
- Prepare without the tomatoes.
- Add cooked rice directly on top of the steak.
- Add water on top of the tomatoes and increase microwave time to 22 minutes, rotating the dish after 10 minutes.
